zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Cheney於大約1445年出生在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯丘其時，她的父親Sir John Cheney35歲，母親Eleanor Shottesbroke25歲。她於1453年與David Stowell在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1509年5月19日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Cheney于大约1445年出生在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯丘其时，她的父亲Sir John Cheney35岁，母亲Eleanor Shottesbroke25岁。她于1453年与David Stowell在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1509年5月19日在英国英格兰薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Cheney was born about 1445, in Eastchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Cheney, was 35 and her mother, Eleanor Shottesbroke, was 25. She married David Stowell in 1453, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 19 May 1509, in Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Cheney(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Cheney(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Shottesbroke(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1453년 영국 잉글랜드에서 David Stowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 컷헬스톤에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com David Stowell em 1453, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Cheney родилась около 1445 г. в местности эасчурч, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Cheney было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Shottesbroke, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Stowell в 1453 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 19 мая 1509 г. в местности котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con David Stowell en 1453, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1509, en Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
